title: ASR Outdoor 15 Inch Metalworking Ceramic Crucible Tongs Melt Precious Metals
description:
Melt your precious metals safely with the ASR Outdoor Crucible Tongs! These tongs screw to tighten the closed steel band around your crucible. The thumbscrew will allow you to secure your tongs to different sized melting dishes or pots. The steel shaft is mounted and secured by a steel pin in the wood handle that will extend the life of your tongs. These tongs are great for melting, pouring and casting precious metals like gold, silver and copper. Make sure you have a set of these tongs before your next metal melting project!

Product Specifications

  • Color: Chrome
  • Size: 15 in
